title: Tsuredure Children
sourceNotes: Short-format ensemble manga — chapter ranges are approximate. Toshiya Wakabayashi's gag/short romcom is a complete 4-koma-style work (AniList lists 212 short chapters / 12 volumes; some sources tally fewer due to differing chapter splits). It has no story arcs — instead it follows many independent couples' brief vignettes that interleave throughout. The 2017 TV short (single season, 12 short episodes) adapts an assortment of these early couples (roughly ch 1-50), so a viewer resumes reading around there. The remainder is unadapted.
